Title: KYC is the first accessible step in Investor Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in; Investor Profile not yet started (KYC, CAN, Mandate = Blank).
Steps:
1. Navigate to Investor Profile screen.
2. Observe available sections.
Expected Results: KYC section is open/accessible; CAN and Mandate are locked/disabled.

Title: CAN section stays locked until KYC is verified
Steps:
1. Go to Investor Profile screen.
2. Try to open the CAN section.
Expected Results: CAN section is locked with a prompt to complete KYC first; user cannot enter CAN details.

Title: Mandate section stays locked until CAN is verified
Steps:
1. Go to Investor Profile screen.
2. Try to open the Mandate section.
Expected Results: Mandate section is locked with a prompt to complete CAN first; user cannot enter Mandate details.

Title: CAN unlocks immediately after KYC is verified
Steps:
1. Complete KYC until status changes to Verified.
2. Return to Investor Profile screen.
Expected Results: CAN section is now unlocked and accessible without needing app restart.

Title: Mandate unlocks immediately after CAN is verified
Steps:
1. Complete CAN until status changes to Verified.
2. Return to Investor Profile screen.
Expected Results: Mandate section is now unlocked and accessible without needing app restart.

Title: KYC status shows Blank before completion
Steps:
1. Open Investor Profile screen.
2. Check KYC status indicator.
Expected Results: KYC status is displayed as Blank.

Title: Complete KYC successfully
Preconditions: KYC = Blank; user has valid KYC details/documents.
Steps:
1. Open KYC section.
2. Fill required details and submit.
Expected Results: KYC status updates to Verified; CAN section unlocks.

Title: CAN status shows Blank before completion
Preconditions: KYC = Verified, CAN not yet started.
Steps:
1. Open Investor Profile screen.
2. Check CAN status indicator.
Expected Results: CAN status is displayed as Blank.

Title: Complete CAN successfully
Steps:
1. Open CAN section.
2. Fill required details and submit.
Expected Results: CAN status updates to Verified; Mandate section unlocks.

Title: Mandate status shows Blank before completion
Preconditions: KYC = Verified, CAN = Verified, Mandate not yet started.
Steps:
1. Open Investor Profile screen.
2. Check Mandate status indicator.
Expected Results: Mandate status is displayed as Blank.

Title: Complete Mandate successfully
Preconditions: KYC = Verified, CAN = Verified, Mandate = Blank.
Steps:
1. Open Mandate section.
2. Fill required bank/mandate details and submit.

Title: Complete full Investor Profile flow end-to-end
Steps:
1. Complete KYC and verify status updates.
2. Complete CAN and verify status updates.
3. Complete Mandate and verify status updates.
Expected Results: All three sections show Verified; Investor Profile is marked complete overall.

Title: Network drop during KYC submission
Preconditions: KYC = Blank; KYC form filled, ready to submit.
Steps:
1. Disable network just before/during KYC submission.
2. Observe app behavior, then re-enable network.
Expected Results: App shows an error/retry state (no crash); KYC remains Blank; resubmission succeeds once network is restored.

Title: Network drop during CAN submission
Preconditions: KYC = Verified; CAN form filled, ready to submit.
Steps:
1. Disable network just before/during CAN submission.
2. Observe app behavior, then re-enable network.
Expected Results: App shows an error/retry state (no crash); CAN remains Blank; resubmission succeeds once network is restored.

Title: Network drop during Mandate submission
Preconditions: KYC = Verified, CAN = Verified; Mandate form filled, ready to submit.
Steps:
1. Disable network just before/during Mandate submission.
2. Observe app behavior, then re-enable network.
Expected Results: App shows an error/retry state (no crash); Mandate remains Blank; resubmission succeeds once network is restored.
